title: Department Manager Vacancy at More Retail Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at More Retail Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
More Retail Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail Digital Technologies:
More Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Digital Technologies!
